{{CargoOrgan
|name=Krost's Ommateum
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10898
|idx=109
|description=This gigantic eye is restored with biological weapon technologies. It resembles Krost's Ommateum and has outstanding performances.
|skill=
|hp=3720
|def=237
|atk=245
|rush=216
|gene1={race} TECH +200
|gene2=All ELMT DMG +40
|gene3=All ELMT RES +40
|gene4=Dung Beetle Incident currency gains +4%
|gene5=Each round, {race} ATK +80
|gene6=Earth DMG +12 per 10 Species Wars
Species War Enlisted: 300/300
|gene7=Dung Beetle Incident currency gains +4% (Awakened)
|}}
